appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a light, dark, or system-matched theme for the app and assistant panel.
appearance.textSizeDescription: Scale the size of text and controls across the app.

sectionSubtitles.general: Shortcuts, dictation, and audio — the essentials for everyday use.
sectionSubtitles.models: Choose the transcription, language, and voice models that run on your machine.
sectionSubtitles.advanced: Startup, output, text replacements, and how long history is kept.
sectionSubtitles.history: Your recent transcriptions and assistant conversations, stored on this device.
sectionSubtitles.postProcessing: Clean up and reshape transcripts with a language model.
sectionSubtitles.assistant: Connect a model, then tune voice, screen vision, web search, and the panel.
sectionSubtitles.memory: A private, on-device profile the assistant remembers you by — fully yours to see and edit.

onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Very fast, English only. Handles accents well.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Fast, English only. Good balance of speed and accuracy.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Code-switching support.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Very fast. Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese.

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: Russian speech recognition. Fast and accurate.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Very fast. English, German, Spanish, French. Supports translation.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Accurate multilingual. 25 European languages. Supports translation.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: A large, slower, but very accurate multilingual model.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: SpeakoFlow needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

enable.label: Remember me
enable.description: Let the assistant keep and use a personal memory. Off by default.

incognito.label: Incognito chat
incognito.description: For this conversation, don't use memory and don't learn anything new.

detail.label: Memory detail
detail.description: How much memory to add to each reply. More detail is richer but uses more tokens.

aboutYou.label: About you
aboutYou.placeholder: e.g. Prefers short, direct answers. Works in Rust and TypeScript. Building a desktop voice assistant.
aboutYou.hint: Always included when memory is on. Keep it to a few sentences — this is the assistant's at-a-glance picture of you.
aboutYou.empty: Nothing saved yet — the assistant fills this in as it learns, or click Edit to write your own.

notes.label: Notes
notes.empty: No notes yet. Add one below, or let the assistant learn them from your chats.

distill.label: Learn from this chat now
distill.description: Pull durable facts from your current conversation into memory, right now.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcuts that trigger speech-to-text recording

transcribe.name: Transcribe
transcribe.description: Press to start recording, press again to stop and type it out.

transcribe_toggle.name: Hands-free Dictation
transcribe_toggle.description: Press once to start, again to stop — no holding needed.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Post-Processing Hotkey
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Always applies AI post-processing to the transcription.

assistant.name: Ask Assistant
assistant.description: Ask the assistant by voice; the answer streams into the floating panel.

assistant_vision.name: Ask with Screen
assistant_vision.description: Ask by voice with your screen attached so it can see what you're looking at.

assistant_panel_toggle.name: Show or Hide Panel
assistant_panel_toggle.description: Shows or hides the floating assistant panel.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for speech recognition. A specific language can improve accuracy.
language.descriptionUnsupported: This model detects the language automatically.

pushToTalk.label: Push To Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to record, release to stop. Quick-tap to lock hands-free recording.

tapToLock.label: Tap to Lock
tapToLock.info: While holding your record shortcut, tap this to lock hands-free recording so you can let go and keep talking. Pick any key that isn't part of your record shortcut, or clear it to turn this off.

models.title: Transcription Models
models.description: Models trade accuracy for speed — pick one that fits your machine.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

categoryDescriptions.stt: Models trade accuracy for speed — pick one that fits your machine.
categoryDescriptions.llm: A local language model for the built-in assistant and transcript cleanup.
categoryDescriptions.tts: Voices for the assistant's spoken replies. Kokoro runs locally.

models.llmHint: After downloading, select this model in the Assistant tab under the Built-in (Local) provider.
models.ttsHint: Speech models run locally and need no download.

customModel.title: Add a custom model
customModel.subtitle: Search Hugging Face for any GGUF model and run it locally.
customModel.searchPlaceholder: Search Hugging Face for GGUF models...
customModel.searchError: Search failed. Check your connection and try again.
customModel.noResults: No models found. Try a different search.
customModel.repoFilesError: Could not load files for this model.
customModel.noGgufFiles: This repository has no downloadable .gguf files.
customModel.enableVisionHint: Downloads an extra projector file so the model can see images.
customModel.addError: Could not add this model. Please try again.

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play a sound when recording starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

lazyStreamClose.label: Keep Mic Open Between Transcriptions
lazyStreamClose.description: Faster back-to-back dictation. May affect Bluetooth audio quality.

whisper.title: Whisper Acceleration
whisper.description: Auto uses the GPU when available.

ort.title: ONNX Acceleration
ort.description: For Parakeet, Canary, and Moonshine models. DirectML is experimental.

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

pasteMethod.title: Paste Method
pasteMethod.description: How transcribed text is inserted into the active app.

typingTool.title: Typing Tool
typingTool.description: Linux tool used for the Direct paste method.

clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling
clipboardHandling.description: Whether the transcription stays in your clipboard after pasting.

autoSubmit.title: Auto Submit
autoSubmit.description: Send a key combination automatically after the text is inserted.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Translate speech from other languages to English.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not supported by the {{model}} model.

modelUnload.title: Unload Model
modelUnload.description: Free memory when the model has been idle for this long.

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Words that are often misheard. Similar-sounding words are corrected to match.

textReplacements.title: Text Replacements
textReplacements.description: Find-and-replace rules applied to every transcript. Supports regex.
textReplacements.empty: No replacements yet. Add a rule to get started.
textReplacements.importError: Could not import: the file is not a valid replacements list

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. Use ${output} inside the prompt text to reference the captured transcript.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Improve grammar and clarity for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.createFirst: Click 'Create New Prompt' above to create your first post-processing prompt.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.retranscribeError: Failed to re-transcribe. Please try again.
history.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. You can re-transcribe using the retry icon.
history.resumeConversation: Continue this conversation in the assistant
history.deleteAssistantError: Failed to delete conversation. Please try again.

historyLimit.title: History limit
historyLimit.description: The maximum number of recordings to keep. Applied the next time you start the app.

recordingRetention.title: Auto-delete recordings
recordingRetention.description: How old recordings are cleaned up. Changes take effect the next time you start the app.
recordingRetention.savedToast: Saved — takes effect the next time you start the app.

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep the mic warm so the first words are never clipped. Uses a little more battery.

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

keyboardImplementation.title: Keyboard Implementation
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and reset to defaults

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay
pasteDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait before pasting. Increase if the wrong text is pasted.

recordingBuffer.title: Extra Recording Buffer
recordingBuffer.description: Milliseconds to keep recording after you release the key.

license.title: License
license.description: SpeakoFlow is open source under the MIT License, building on Handy (also MIT) by CJ Pais.

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: The open-source app SpeakoFlow is built on
handy.details: SpeakoFlow began as a fork of Handy by CJ Pais. Huge thanks to the original project and its contributors for the foundation.

whisper.title: Whisper.cpp
whisper.description: High-performance inference of OpenAI's Whisper automatic speech recognition model
whisper.details: SpeakoFlow uses Whisper.cpp for fast, local speech-to-text processing. Thanks to the amazing work by Georgi Gerganov and contributors.

llamacpp.title: llama.cpp
llamacpp.description: The engine powering the built-in local language model
llamacpp.details: SpeakoFlow runs local LLMs with llama.cpp. Thanks to Georgi Gerganov and the ggml community for making fast, on-device inference possible.

kokoro.title: Kokoro
kokoro.description: The local text-to-speech voice for the assistant
kokoro.details: SpeakoFlow speaks replies using the Kokoro TTS model, running entirely on your device. Thanks to the Kokoro project and its contributors.

tapToLock.label: Tap to Lock
tapToLock.info: While holding the assistant shortcut, tap this to lock hands-free so you can let go and keep talking. Defaults to Shift. Pick a key that isn't part of your assistant shortcut (one that overlaps, like Space when the shortcut is Ctrl+Alt+Space, is ignored), or clear it to turn this off.

provider.title: Assistant Provider
provider.providerDescription: The provider that answers assistant questions.
provider.baseUrlDescription: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Azure endpoints are normalized automatically.
provider.modelDescription: Model or deployment name to use for assistant answers.
provider.noModelsFound: No models returned. Type the model name instead.
provider.builtinModelDescription: Pick a downloaded local model. It runs on your device with no API key.
provider.builtinNoModels: No local models yet. Download one from the Models tab under "Language Model".
provider.builtinReady: Runs fully on your device. No API key, no setup.
provider.builtinEngineMissing: First use downloads a small local engine automatically (one time), then runs fully offline. No setup needed.
provider.contextSizeDescription: Tokens the local model keeps in context — it must hold the system prompt, chat history, any screenshot (vision models can spend 1,000+ tokens on a single image), and the reply. Larger fits more and is needed for reliable screen vision + web search, but uses more memory. Default 8192; 16384 is recommended if your machine has the RAM to spare. You can lower it later to save memory.
provider.unloadTimeoutDescription: Free up RAM/VRAM by unloading the local model after it has been idle this long. It reloads automatically on next use.

characters.title: Profiles
characters.description: Task-focused profiles you can switch between. The active profile sets the assistant's name, role, and instructions — and how long its replies run. Switch anytime from the panel header.
characters.aiPlaceholder: e.g. a concise release-notes writer, or a patient tutor who explains every step
characters.rolePlaceholder: Short description shown on the card (optional)

responseLength.label: Response length
responseLength.hint: How long this profile's replies run. "Inherit" follows your global Assistant setting.

characters.greetingPlaceholder: Optional opening line shown in an empty chat
characters.catNote: The Cat ignores the AI entirely — it just meows. Nothing to configure here.

memory.label: Conversation memory
memory.description: How many recent messages are sent as context each turn. 0 disables memory.

responseLength.label: Response length
responseLength.description: Preferred reply length. "No effect" leaves your prompt untouched.

vision.title: Screen Vision
vision.enableDescription: Let the assistant see your screen when you ask about it. Requires a vision-capable model.

timing.label: When to capture
timing.description: For voice questions: capture the moment you start asking, or wait until the message is sent. Typed messages always capture on send.

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.enableDescription: Let the assistant search the web when a question needs current information.
webSearch.openRouterNativeDescription: When on, OpenRouter runs the search itself (its :online mode) using your OpenRouter credits. When off, the app searches with your search provider below.
webSearch.providerDescription: Serper is a good default. Every provider has a free tier.
webSearch.apiKeyDescription: Key for the selected search provider.
webSearch.fetchContentDescription: Read the full text of each result instead of snippets. Better answers, but slower.
webSearch.depthDescription: Quick for simple facts, Standard for most questions, Deep for hard ones.
webSearch.localSmartDescription: Let the local model decide when to search. Off uses a fast keyword check instead.
webSearch.creditBudgetDescription: Daily cap on Firecrawl credits before search pauses. 0 = no limit.
webSearch.testDescription: Run a sample search with the current provider and key.

tts.title: Voice Output (TTS)
tts.enableDescription: Read the assistant's replies out loud.
tts.stopOnDictationDescription: Stop any reply that's still playing when you start dictating.
tts.engineDescription: Kokoro runs locally for free. The other engines use your API key.
tts.dtypeDescription: fp32 is highest quality; q8 is faster on CPU. Changing this reloads the model.
tts.testDescription: Play a short sample with the current settings.
tts.testPhrase: Hi! This is a test of SpeakoFlow's voice output.
tts.baseUrlDescription: OpenAI-compatible TTS endpoint. A base URL or a full /audio/speech URL both work.
tts.azureBaseUrlDescription: Your Azure Speech endpoint from the portal, e.g. https://eastus2.tts.speech.microsoft.com.
tts.apiKeyDescription: Separate from the assistant LLM key.
tts.modelDescription: Model or deployment name, e.g. gpt-4o-mini-tts (OpenAI/Azure) or eleven_flash_v2_5 (ElevenLabs).
tts.remoteVoiceDescription: Voice for OpenAI-compatible TTS, e.g. alloy, echo, nova, shimmer.
tts.azureVoiceDescription: Azure voice name, e.g. en-US-JennyNeural. Click Load voices to browse.
tts.elevenVoiceDescription: ElevenLabs voice ID (from the Voices tab in their dashboard).
tts.promptDescription: Instructions for generating the brief spoken summary of each answer.

appearance.title: Panel Appearance
appearance.previewDescription: Live preview of the panel with your text size and opacity.
appearance.previewAssistant: Lots! Ask me anything — I can even look at your screen.
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Size of the chat text in the assistant panel.
appearance.panelSizeDescription: Overall size of the floating assistant panel. You can also drag its edges to resize.
appearance.opacityDescription: How opaque the floating panel is. 100% is fully solid; lower values let the desktop blur through.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: SpeakoFlow needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Microphone access was denied by the operating system. Please grant microphone permission in your system settings.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Enable microphone access in Settings → Privacy & security → Microphone (including desktop app access).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Grant microphone access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Grant microphone access in your system's sound or privacy settings.

errors.noInputDevice: No audio input device was detected. Please connect a microphone or headset and try again.
errors.pasteFailed: Text could not be pasted into the active application.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the SpeakoFlow interface

overlay.locked: Recording hands-free — press the hotkey again or done to stop
overlay.askAssistant: Ask the assistant instead of typing this

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.empty:
Ask by voice with your assistant shortcut,
or type below.
assistant.regenerate: Regenerate answer (the old one stays in History)
assistant.attachScreen: Screen vision — attach your screen to each message until turned off

attach.snip: Snip a region of the screen

snip.hint: Drag to snip a region — Esc to cancel

pill.disarmScreen: Screen vision is on — click to turn it off
pill.armScreen: Screen vision is off — click to turn it on

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.no_provider: No assistant model is set up yet. Pick a provider in Settings → Assistant.
errors.no_model: Your provider has no model selected. Choose one in Settings → Assistant.
errors.engine_start: The built-in model couldn't start. Try again, or pick a different model in Settings → Assistant.
errors.provider: The model couldn't answer. Check your API key and connection, then try again.
errors.vision_unsupported: This model can't read your screen. Pick a vision-capable model in Settings → Assistant, or ask again without screen vision.
errors.screenshot_too_large: The screen capture was too large for this provider. Please try again — it will be compressed harder.
errors.screen_capture: Couldn't capture the screen. Try again, or ask without screen vision.
errors.transcription: Couldn't transcribe your voice. Please try speaking again.
errors.tts: The spoken reply failed. Check your TTS settings, or read the answer in the panel.
errors.tts_local: The local voice couldn't load. Check your connection or switch TTS engines in Settings.
errors.tts_blocked: Your system blocked the voice from playing on its own. Click anywhere in the panel to hear the reply.
errors.tts_blockedShort: Tap the panel to hear it
errors.tts_playback: Couldn't play the voice on your output device. Check your speaker/output settings, then try again.
errors.mic_denied: Microphone access is blocked. Allow it in your system privacy settings.
errors.mic_unavailable: No microphone was found. Connect one and try again.
errors.mic_error: The microphone couldn't start. It may be in use by another app.

notices.web_search_failed: Web search didn't return results — answering without them.
